The '''Zantay Caves''' were on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]], near the [[Zantay Hills]]. They were the home of the [[Dashta eel]]s, and retreated to the cave after the [[X'Ting]] began spreading across Cestus. The Caves were mapped by [[Kilaphor Dashta]] around 422 BBY. [[Sheeka Tull]] and [[Jangotat]] met here to continue their relationship in sight of the Dashta eels.
